text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event_helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to newcomers.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore and introduce yourself!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you — jump in and help keep things running smoothly.
